title: Anthropic Just Dropped a Masterclass on Building Agent Harnesses (for Large Codebases)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates how to build an AI Layer harness around Claude Code for large codebase work, implementing self-improving hooks, scoped skills, LSP, MCP, and subagents. The core insight is that the harness architecture matters more than the base model itself.
